instruction: Create /app/parse_csv.py that reads a CSV file from stdin and outputs a JSON array of objects (one per row, using the header row as keys). Handle quoted fields with commas inside them. Print the JSON to stdout.
test_command:
echo 'name,age,city
"Doe, John",30,"New York"
Jane,25,Boston' | python3 /app/parse_csv.py | python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); assert len(data)==2; assert data[0]['name']=='Doe, John'; assert data[0]['age']=='30'; assert data[1]['city']=='Boston'; print('ALL TESTS PASSED')"
